name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Cabinet File Expansion
notes:
This Building Block detects the use of built-in expand utility to decompress cab files.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Bhabesh Raj
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Cabinet File Expansion
SIGMA Description: Adversaries can use the built-in expand utility to decompress cab files as seen in recent Iranian MeteorExpress attack


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Cabinet File Expansion on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of expand.exe

when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.cab%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/f:%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%-f:%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%c:\programdata\%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%c:\public\%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\appdata\local\temp\%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\appdata\roaming\temp\%') AQL filter query

when the event matches ("Parent Process File File Path"='C:\Application Files (x86)\Dell\UpdateService\ServiceShell.exe' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%c:\programdata\dell\updateservice\temp\%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Cabinet File Expansion on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of expand.exe

AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.cab%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/f:%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%-f:%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%c:\programdata\%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%c:\public\%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\appdata\local\temp\%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\appdata\roaming\temp\%') AQL filter query

AND NOT when the event matches ("Parent Process File File Path"='C:\Application Files (x86)\Dell\UpdateService\ServiceShell.exe' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%c:\programdata\dell\updateservice\temp\%') AQL filter query
